arts.ttl: 'I will return': £25m player Liverpool sold suggests he wants to come back to Anfield in three years
Newcastle transfer news: Eddie Howe's side eye ex-academy player as part of £97m Bournemouth raid?
arts.sum: Newcastle will reportedly consider raiding Eddie Howe's former side Bournemouth for three of their star players in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2024/25 points tally predicted ahead of Arsenal Premier League title showdown
arts.sum: Liverpool command the Premier League title race with an 11-point gap over challengers Arsenal

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool defender admits desire to rejoin Reds
arts.sum: One of Liverpool's former centre-backs has admitted that he wants to return to Anfield.

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique doesn’t view PSG as underdog heading into Liverpool game
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain head into their UEFA Champions League Round of 16 game with confidence, and rightly so. PSG are unbeaten domestically this season. As well as being in the quarter-finals…

arts.ttl: Liverpool sent Mohamed Salah verdict with Lionel Messi's 'heir' named as perfect replacement
arts.sum: With Mo Salah's contract situation still unsolved, Liverpool must start considering possible replacements for the Egyptian, and Emmanuel Petit thinks he's found the 'perfect' one

arts.ttl: Newcastle player ‘biggest victim’ of club’s latest decision – Magpies man was offered for transfer
arts.sum: Newcastle United’s Alexander Isak has been linked to a few top clubs and Barcelona are one of them. The striker has impressed for the Magpies this season, managing 21 goals and five assists from 30 games. There’s been growing interest in the Newcastle star and recent claims have stated Barca are in the mix. arts.ttl: Liverpool star sold for £25m after demanding exit admits he wants to return six months on
arts.sum: Sepp van den Berg left Liverpool for Brentford in the summer after growing frustrated with a lack of opportunities at Anfield - but has not ruled out a return in the future

arts.ttl: Arne Slot: Liverpool's "regimental" but "genius" manager can complete 36-year Arsenal revenge mission
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be "right up there" with the best Liverpool managers if he can steer the Reds to Premier League glory, former Reds striker John Aldridge believes.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's Mohamed Salah plan as Lewis Hall Liverpool tactic hint dropped
arts.sum: Salah has netted more goals than Chelsea and Manchester United combined for the month of February and has created more chances from open play than any other player across Europe's top five leagues this season (58). "I think every player's different, every player's development from their teens to their early twenties, it's a crucial stage if you're gonna become a regular first-team player for a club like Newcastle, there's a lot that goes into it," Howe told reporters this week, when asked about Hall and Lewis Miley impressing.
